title: Create public v0.1.0 GitHub release tag
description: Created and pushed the v0.1.0 annotated tag on the sanitized public GitHub repository, then created the GitHub Release with npm, Pages, and CDN links.
decision_notes: The tag was created in /private/tmp/archmap-public-release, the sanitized public repository clone, so private AOF history remains unpublished.
The release points at the public HEAD that already contains the Pages workflow fix and the GitHub Pages deployment.
verification: git ls-remote --tags origin 'v0.1.0*': no existing tag before creation
